marketState: neutral-to-bearish, price sitting almost exactly at model fair value with soft seasonal/storage headwinds
summary: Front-month NG is trading right on top of its modeled fair value ($2.917, spread only -$0.025) so there is no fair-value edge today. Seasonality is the main tilt: price is already -11.7pp below its 16-year median for this date (-15.1% YTD vs -3.4% median), and the forward-looking stats for this specific calendar spot show only a 31% historical chance of being higher in 4 weeks with a typical -3.1% move, though the reliability flag is Low (50pp spread) so this should not be over-weighted. Storage printed a bearish surprise (+61 Bcf build vs -11 Bcf forecast) and stocks are +184 Bcf above the 5-year average, reinforcing a comfortable-supply backdrop. Near-term weather is the offsetting bullish factor: 1-7D demand is running +14.5% above the 5y norm at the top of its range (rangePos 0.8), though the 8-16D outlook cools off to only +4.7% above normal. Managed money is net short (-60,295 contracts, ratio 0.8) but only at the 35th percentile of its 5y range, so positioning is not stretched either way, and no technicals data was available this cycle to help time entries.

longTerm.entry: $2.90 - $3.00 (scale in on any bounce toward fair value)
longTerm.sizing: 1R approx 1% account risk, scale out half at TP1
longTerm.rationale: Price is already well below its seasonal median (-11.7pp) yet the 4-week forward stats still skew down (31% prob higher, typical -3.1% move), and the storage build was a bearish surprise with stocks +184 Bcf over the 5y average, arguing for continued oversupply pressure into the 3-12 week window.
longTerm.invalidation: A close back above the fair-value upper band edge (~$3.42) or a run of below-normal storage builds that erases the 5y surplus would invalidate the short thesis.

shortTerm.rationale: Near-term evidence is genuinely mixed: elevated 1-7D cooling demand (+14.5% vs 5y, rangePos 0.8) and a mildly backwardated front-to-next spread argue for firmness, while the just-reported bearish storage surprise and a front price already at FAIR value argue for no edge; with technicals unavailable this cycle there is no timing tool to reconcile the two.
shortTerm.trigger: Wait for either technical data to return with a confirmed trend/momentum read, or a clear break of the $2.85-$2.95 chop zone with the 8-16D demand outlook re-accelerating above +10% vs 5y before taking a directional short-term position.

keyDrivers: Price at fair value (front spread -$0.025) with no near-term mispricing edge
Price -11.7pp below 16y seasonal median; 4-week forward stats skew down (31% prob higher, -3.1% typical)
Storage surprise +72 Bcf bearish, stocks +184 Bcf above 5y average
1-7D cooling demand +14.5% vs 5y at top of range, but 8-16D fades to +4.7%
Managed money net short but only 35th percentile of 5y range - not stretched
risks: Seasonality reliability flagged Low (50pp spread) so the bearish 4-week stat could easily miss
No technicals data this cycle removes a key short-term timing/confirmation tool
A hotter-than-expected 8-16D outlook or colder shift could quickly flip near-term demand bullish and squeeze the short-side thesis
